title: Liquid Intelligent Technologies
subtitle: Premium Student Fiber
description: High-speed, reliable student fiber packages. Best for heavy video streaming, research, and seamless zoom/online class sessions.

title: Deltalink Broadband
subtitle: Affordable Student Packages
description: Highly popular internet provider near Gate A and Embassy. Offers customized budget student packages with steady bandwidth speeds.

title: Mawingu Wi-Fi
subtitle: Pay-As-You-Use Hotspot
description: Widely accessible hotspot internet coverage. Allows purchasing daily, weekly, or monthly cheap tokens matching student budgets.

title: Safani Net
subtitle: Fast Wireless Unlimited
description: Wireless high-performance internet provider covering Gate B and Boma. Excellent support desk and fast connection installations.

title: DeKUT Student Movers
subtitle: Local Hostel Moving
description: Affordable handcart and light truck moving specifically catering to students transferring between local areas (Embassy, Gate A, Gate B).

title: Nyeri Smart Movers
subtitle: Professional Moving Truck
description: Full-service moving with packaging boxes, loading, and safe transit. Ideal for senior students moving full households to Nyeri town or Mweiga.

title: Boda Cargo Services
subtitle: Quick Single Item Transport
description: Fast boda-boda cargo services. Perfect for transferring single mattresses, gas cylinders, small boxes, or study desks instantly.
coverage: Gate A, Gate B, Embassy, Boma

title: Clean & Bright Laundry
subtitle: Wash, Dry & Fold
description: Quick-turnaround laundry service located opposite Gate A. Features high-grade washing machines, tumble dry, and neat garment folding.

title: Fresh Student Laundry
subtitle: Wash & Steam Press
description: Premium student laundry services at Gate B. Clothes are washed, ironed, steam-pressed, and wrapped on hangers ready for pickup.

title: Sparkle Cleaning Services
subtitle: Hostel Room Deep Clean
description: Professional cleaning helpers specializing in scrubbing hostel floors, bathrooms, windows, and dusting. Perfect for moving-in or moving-out deep cleans.
